title: Platform System Manager (Terraform| AWS | ServiceNow | 5000-6500 | GOVT)
description:
• Job Title: Platform System Manager (Terraform| AWS | ServiceNow | 5000-6500 | GOVT)
  • Duration: 18 months
  • Location: Depot Rd / Bukit Merah Central
  • Salary: 5000-6500
  • Eligibility: Only Singaporean

Key Responsibilities

Operational Management

  • Manage a team of outsourced operation/system engineers on the daily O&S management and service delivery of Tech Marketplace (SDMP and IDP)
  • Review operational change request, maintenance schedules and deployment plans
  • Ensure operation teams comply with operational SLAs and incident response timeline
  • Coordinate with Cloud Platform Service Providers on incident triaging and root cause analysis
  • Track and review operations deliverables such as account reviews, vulnerabilities management, monthly operation report

Stakeholders Coordination

  • Primary point of contact for supported operational team across Platform Service Providers
  • Collaborate closely with platform providers (ServiceNow Platform team, IDP catalog service providers) to ensure requirements are fulfilled and aligned

System Governance and Improvements

  • Work with operation team to maintain documentation (runbook, playbook, SOP) are updated timely
  • Identify and propose process and automation opportunities to reduce manual work
  • Ensure configuration standard, access management and compliance standards are being adhere
  • Partner with platform teams to plan and test new features, upgrades or integrations on the existing systems
  • Manage system lifecycle activities i.e. patching, upgrade and EOL/EOS deprecation management

Job Requirement

  • More than 2 years of experience in AWS Cloud Operations
  • More than 2 years of experience with ServiceNow platform
  • Good understanding in managing enterprise IT systems or platforms
  • Good understanding of Terraform/IaC and DevSecOps processes
  • Excellent problem-solving, analytical and communication skills

-------------

By submitting your resume or personal data, you consent to BGC Group Pte Ltd collecting, using, and disclosing your personal data to our clients and partners for the purpose of evaluating your suitability for job opportunities and related recruitment services. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to our Privacy Policy for Job Applicants, available at https://bgc-group.com/notice-for-job-applicants

In Ref: SS – JO-27522-B
BGC Group Pte Ltd (Outsourcing)
EA 05C3053

postedCompany.description:
BGC Group is an international recruitment and manpower outsourcing firm that identifies and delivers human capital solutions that imperative to every successful company’s growth. 

Having helped 25,000 individuals quickly land rewarding careers in companies that drive industries since our inception in 2005, we believe in developing relationships based on a solid ground of trust between both employers and job-seekers. This is what differentiates us and gives us a competitive edge from the rest. 

Staying true to our vision of Bridging & Growing Careers Because We Care, we are now proudly listed under Omnibridge Holdings on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (08462:HK) in 2017.
